excerpt_zh: 做 Typevoise 之前我以为难点是识别。后来发现真正的瓶颈在另一个地方。
excerpt_en: Before Typevoise I thought the hard part was recognition. The real bottleneck was somewhere else.

title_zh: AI 时代最危险的不是不会用
title_en: The Real Risk in the AI Era Isn't That You Don't Use It
excerpt_zh: 教零基础学员的时候我观察到三种「假装会用 AI」的姿势。哪一种都能让聪明人陷在原地。
excerpt_en: Teaching beginners, I noticed three postures of pretending to use AI. Any one of them can trap a smart person in place.

excerpt_zh: 做课的人总想给每个概念配比喻。但学员的脑子里只有三个槽位。多了不是加分，是互相冲撞。
excerpt_en: Course designers want a metaphor for every concept. But students only have three slots. More than that, metaphors don't add — they collide.

title_zh: 为什么自建一个 Claude Code 中转网关
title_en: Why I Self-Host a Claude Code Gateway
excerpt_zh: 朋友问我为什么不直接订 Claude Pro。一开始我以为是为了省钱，做完之后才明白不是。
excerpt_en: A friend asked why I don't just subscribe to Claude Pro. I thought it was about money. Turns out it wasn't.
